name: CSRF — Subdomain CORS Wildcard

db_field_map.title: CSRF — Subdomain CORS Wildcard
db_field_map.ar_title: CSRF — نطاق فرعي مع CORS Wildcard

educational_objective: Understand that a wildcard CORS policy (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *.corp.com) combined with Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true means any compromised subdomain can make authenticated cross-origin requests — turning a subdomain XSS into a full CSRF chain.
scenario: CorpApp API uses Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *.corp.com with credentials: true. A marketing subdomain (promo.corp.com) has a stored XSS. An attacker chains: XSS on promo → credentialed fetch to api.corp.com → CSRF attack executed silently.
ar_scenario: CorpApp API يستخدم CORS wildcard *.corp.com مع credentials. أي XSS في نطاق فرعي يمكنه تنفيذ طلبات مصادق عليها لـ API.

hints_metadata.content: The API accepts requests from any *.corp.com subdomain with credentials. What happens if one of those subdomains has an XSS vulnerability?
hints_metadata.ar_content: الـ API يقبل طلبات من أي نطاق فرعي *.corp.com مع credentials. ماذا يحدث لو كان أحد هذه النطاقات يعاني من XSS؟

hints_metadata.content: Use the XSS on promo.corp.com to inject a fetch() call that sends a credentialed request to api.corp.com/admin/action. The CORS wildcard means the browser will include the victim's cookies.
hints_metadata.ar_content: استخدم XSS على promo.corp.com لحقن fetch() يُرسل طلباً مصادقاً لـ api.corp.com/admin/action.

hints_metadata.content: Click 'Simulate Subdomain XSS + CSRF Chain' — the exploit: XSS on promo → fetch to api with credentials → api allows it (wildcard CORS) → action executed → flag returned.
hints_metadata.ar_content: اضغط 'Simulate Subdomain XSS + CSRF Chain' — الاستغلال: XSS → fetch مصادق → API يقبل → action يُنفَّذ.

flag_validation.note: Returned from /simulate-subdomain when full XSS→CSRF chain is executed

hidden_solution_path.exploit_path: XSS on promo.corp.com → fetch('https://api.corp.com/admin/action', {credentials:'include'}) → wildcard CORS allows → action executes
hidden_solution_path.key_insight: Wildcard CORS + credentials = any subdomain compromise = full API access
hidden_solution_path.fix_summary: Use explicit origin allowlist; never combine wildcard CORS with credentials:true; fix XSS on all subdomains
